name: Frolic Water Adapter 18mm
summary: 18 mm water pipe adapter for the Frolic Thermal Extractor, engineered to pair with larger glass setups for smoother, water-cooled vapour delivery.
description: 18 mm water pipe adapter for the Frolic Thermal Extractor, engineered to pair with larger glass setups for smoother, water-cooled vapour delivery. The Frolic 18 mm Water Adapter is a dedicated glass-connection accessory that allows the Frolic Thermal Extractor to be used with standard 18 mm female joints. Designed to retain the Frolic’s native airflow adjustment, it enables effective water filtration for reduced vapour temperature and a more refined inhalation. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
